head.title: About Me
head.text-1: In this section you'll learn a bit about me, my skills and some of my story
head.strong-1: in case you want to know it!
head.text-2: I combine design and code to

aboutMe.strong-1: frontend development, backend development, and interface design.
aboutMe.text-2: I've worked on projects where I combine
aboutMe.strong-2: application logic, user experience, and scalable architecture
aboutMe.text-3: to build complete, intuitive, and performance-focused web products.
aboutMe.strong-3: Here's a summary of my skills

technical.subtitle: Technical skills focused on building modern web interfaces.
technical.li-1: Application development with React, prioritizing performance, maintainability, and best practices.
technical.li-2: Interface design in Figma using UI/UX principles to create clear and intuitive experiences.
technical.li-3: Responsive and accessible layout work for an optimal experience across devices and user types.
technical.li-4: API integration, async data handling, and SEO optimization to improve visibility and performance.
technical.li-5: Application setup and deployment with a custom domain, integrating services such as Supabase.
technical.li-6: Work with modular architecture to build solid, scalable interfaces that are easy to maintain.

design.subtitle: Skills focused on server-side logic and data management.
design.li-1: Development of APIs and servers using Node.js and Express, structuring applications in a modular and scalable way.
design.li-2: Implementation of architectures based on routes, controllers, and models to keep code organized and maintainable.
design.li-3: Database modeling and normalization, defining relationships, data types, and efficient structures.
design.li-4: Integration and management of databases such as MySQL and PostgreSQL, understanding data structure and relationships.
design.li-5: Use of middleware for validation, request handling, and security configuration such as CORS.
design.li-6: File storage handling through bucket-based services, allowing resources to be managed and served within applications.

soft.subtitle: Soft skills and professional attitude
soft.li-1: Ability to work in teams and foster a collaborative environment.
soft.li-2: Effective communication skills to convey ideas and receive feedback.
soft.li-3: Adaptability to changes and challenges in dynamic environments.
soft.li-4: Efficient time management and task prioritization to meet objectives.
soft.li-5: Proactive attitude towards problem solving and decision making.
soft.li-6: Commitment to continuous learning and professional improvement.

toolsCaption.supabase: Database and backend as a service
toolsCaption.express: Minimal framework for APIs and servers
toolsCaption.render: Platform for web hosting and deployment
toolsCaption.csharp: Modern language for apps and backend
